title: pouteria cotinifolia var. pubescens
intro: Pouteria cotinifolia var. pubescens, also known as the pouteria or canari, is a plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Pouteria cotinifolia var. pubescens is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used as a tincture or added to salves and creams for topical application.
